description: JUnit test class for testing the MeController endpoint /api/me within a Spring Boot web application. It verifies behavior when authorization headers are missing, valid, or invalid, focusing on JWT validation and response status/content.

classes.name: test_me_controller_webmvc_test
classes.description: JUnit test class to validate the behavior of the /api/me endpoint in various JWT scenarios within a Spring Boot MVC environment.

methods.name: me_withoutAuth_is401
methods.description: Tests that a GET request without Authorization header returns a 401 Unauthorized status.

methods.name: me_withAuth_is200
methods.description: Tests that a GET request with a valid JWT header returns a 200 OK status with correct subject and authorities in the JSON response.

methods.name: me_withInvalidJwt_is401
methods.description: Tests that a GET request with an invalid JWT token results in a 401 Unauthorized response.
